folio.label: 123v
folio.l: Til wel neygú , the day bygan to Spénge
The norice of digestiou~ , the sleep~
Gan on hem wynke , & bad hem taken kep~
That mechel drynk & labour , wyl haue rest
And witú a galpyngö moutú , hem alle he kest
And seide that it was tyme , to lye a doun
For blod was , in his dominaciouö
Cherishetú blood , natures frend q¶ he
They thanked hi~ galpyngö , by two by three
And euäy wygút , gan drawe hi~ to his rest
As sleep hem bad , they toke it for the best
Here dremes shuln nat now , ben tolde for me
Ful were here hedes , of fumositee
That causetú dreem , of whicú there is no charge
They slepe , til that it was , prime large
The moste parte , but it were Canacee
She was ful mesurable , as wo~men be
For of hire fader , had she taken leue
To gon to rest , sone after it was eue
Hire list nat appalled , for to be
Ne on the morwe , vnfestliche for to se
And slept hire first sleep~ , & thanne a woke
For swicú a ioie , she in hire hert toke
Bothe of hire queynt Ryngö , & hire Mirour
That twenty tyme , she chaunged hire colour
And in hire sleep~ , rigút for inpressiouö
Of hire Mirour , she had a visiouö
Wherfore , er that the sonne , gan vp glyde
She cleped vp on hire Maistres , hire beside
And seide , that hire list for to ryse
Theise olde wo~men , that ben gladly wyse
As is hire Maistresse , answered a non
And seide Madame , whider wolde ©e gon
Thus erly , for the folk ben alle in rest
I wil q¶ she arrisen , for me lest
No lengere for to slepe , and walke a boute
Hire Maistresse clepeth wo~men , a gret route
And vp they risen , wel an ten or twelue
Vp risetú fressú Canacee , hire selue
As rody and brigút , as dotú the ©onge Sonne
That in the Ram , is foure degrees vp ronne
Non heighere was he , whan she redy was
And fortú she walketú , esily a paas
Arrayed after the lusty seson , swote
Ligútly for to pleye , & walke on foote
